overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 2 capped by highest severity CRITICAL.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends setting the isolated debt ceiling to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC on Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, and Polygon v3 to strengthen protection against risky borrowing.

disclosed_entities.name: MAI/MIMATIC
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: freeze MAI/MIMATIC and set LTV -> 0 ... recommends setting isolated debt ceilings to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC.

disclosed_entities.name: Avalanche Steward
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Changes on Avalanche can be implemented using the pre-deployed steward located at [`0x0cb2535d00cddfae5ed1aff2e5a0239fc947d17d`]

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: using the pre-deployed steward located at [`0x0cb2535d00cddfae5ed1aff2e5a0239fc947d17d`]

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Will further strengthen protection against potentially risky borrowing against MAI collateral.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: recommends setting isolated debt ceilings to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only consists of routine parameter changes (setting debt ceilings to 0) across multiple chains using pre-deployed payloads.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The proposal implements changes on Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Avalanche v3 using the following pre-deployed payloads

limitations: Does not detail exactly how Avalanche steward execution logic differs from the payload pattern utilized for the other chains.

conflict_detection.summary: An undisclosed address participates in an uncovered critical business action.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Pause or escalate manual review because an uncovered critical business action is linked to an undisclosed address.
